C:\WINDOWS\system32\wsl.exe --distribution Ubuntu-22.04 --exec /bin/bash -c "export CLION_IDE=TRUE && export JETBRAINS_IDE=TRUE && cd /home/syalsr/CPP/GIS/cmake-build-debug && /usr/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=/usr/bin/gcc '-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=/usr/bin/g++' -G 'CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles' -S /home/syalsr/CPP/GIS -B /home/syalsr/CPP/GIS/cmake-build-debug"
-- Configuring done
-- Generating done
-- Build files have been written to: /home/syalsr/CPP/GIS/cmake-build-debug
